summary: ANIMATION & TWEEN AUDIT — 14 checks. 10 PASS. 4 FAIL (2 MEDIUM, 2 LOW). 3 WARN. Key gap: HUD life bar jumps instantly on damage/heal — no tween animation (hud_controller.gd:90). SelectionSauvegarde buttons have no entry animation. Most UI is well-animated: option hover/press, card reveal, merlin bubble, walk event stagger, transition pixel effects all PASS.

checks.finding: _life_bar.value = current — instant snap, no tween. Life changes (damage or heal) cause bar to jump. Expected: tween_property(life_bar, 'value', current, 0.3) TRANS_CUBIC EASE_OUT.
Danger color applied instantly: _life_bar.modulate = CRT_PALETTE['danger']. No pulse or flash tween. Missing: brief modulate pulse (white→danger→white) for tactile damage feedback.

4 save-slot buttons built dynamically but appear instantly with no entry stagger. Scene loads and buttons pop in. Expected: fade-in + scale-from-small stagger (0.08s delay each) like walk_event_overlay.gd:261-265.

Run summary content (biome title, ogham list, mission brief) appears all at once. Only 1 tween: enter button fade (line 198-199). Missing: staggered reveal of content sections (biome → ogham → mission → button) for anticipation.
Excellent: hover scale (1.07 TRANS_BACK), press squeeze (0.92→1.0 + modulate flash), keyboard highlight. All 3 interaction states animated.
Card reveal tween: parallel fade-in + slide-up per node. TRANS_CUBIC/TRANS_BACK. Good.
Rich pixel drop animation, glow pulse, biome title fade-in, zoom tween. Full PS1 aesthetic.
Looping mist tween (TRANS_SINE), partir_btn hover scale (TRANS_BACK), hotspot fade-in. Good ambient animation.
Slide-in + fade (TRANS_CUBIC EASE_OUT) and fade-out. Good.
Staggered button entry: modulate+scale+position per button with 0.08s delay increment. TRANS_BACK EASE_OUT. Excellent pattern to replicate in SelectionSauvegarde.
Entry animation via MenuPrincipalAnimations delegate, mist loop, time-tint, button hover all animated via _anim module.
Forest color tween (TRANS_SINE) on end, overlay fade-in (0.8s). Functional. Reward counter lacks count-up animation (WARN-LOW).
Full typewriter/boot animation with sequential tweens, blink effect, phase transitions. Polished.
12 tween usages across minigames. minigame_base.gd has fade-out on completion. Individual minigames (mg_volonte, mg_apaisement, etc.) need per-check — not blocking.

warnings.finding: MapMonde.tscn is an empty Control node. HubAntre.gd:23 declares SCENE_MAPMONDE but never uses it in production transitions. Stub scene.

warnings.area: Dual menu path: MenuPrincipal vs Menu3DPC
warnings.finding: ui_overlay_narrative.gd:289 transitions to 'res://scenes/MenuPrincipal.tscn' (older MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd). Active main menu is Menu3DPC.tscn. If narrative end-game triggers, player lands on old menu.
HubAntre.gd:16 SCENE_TRANSITION='res://scenes/TransitionBiome.tscn' declared but never used. HubAntre goes directly to BroceliandeForest3D (SCENE_FOREST). Dead constant. Low risk.

patterns_learned: walk_event_overlay.gd stagger pattern (modulate+scale+position with delay increment) is the reference for button entry animations
HUD bars (ProgressBar) should use tween_property for value changes, not direct assignment
ParchmentPreRun uses safe PixelTransition fallback pattern: get_node_or_null('/root/PixelTransition') — this is correct for headless compatibility
MapMonde.tscn is a stub scene — SCENE_MAPMONDE in HubAntre is dead constant
